ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "driving_license" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the customer has a driving license */,
  "region_code" INTEGER /* Code representing the region where the customer resides */,
  "previously_insured" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the customer was previously insured */,
  "vehicle_age" TEXT /* Age of the customer's vehicle */,
  "vehicle_damage" TEXT /* Indicates whether the customer's vehicle has been damaged */,
  "annual_income" REAL /* Annual income of the customer */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the customer */,
  "dependents" INTEGER /* Number of dependents of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_region_code FOREIGN KEY ("region_code") REFERENCES regions ("region_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who owns the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of the vehicle (e.g., car, bike, truck) */,
  "vehicle_make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year_of_purchase" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was purchased */,
  "engine_capacity" REAL /* Engine capacity of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Fuel type of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer associated with the policy */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle associated with the policy */,
  "annual_premium" REAL /* Annual premium amount for the policy */,
  "policy_sales_channel" INTEGER /* Code representing the sales channel through which the policy was sold */,
  "vintage" INTEGER /* Number of days the policy has been active */,
  "policy_status" TEXT /* Status of the policy (e.g., active, inactive, cancelled) */,
  "date_issued" TEXT /* Date the policy was issued */,
  "date_expires" TEXT /* Date the policy expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_policy_sales_channel FOREIGN KEY ("policy_sales_channel") REFERENCES policy_sales_channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_sales_channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales channel */,
  "channel_description" TEXT /* Description of the sales channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the policy associated with the claim */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was submitted */,
  "claim_amount" REAL /* Amount of the claim */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the claim */,
  "claim_type" TEXT /* Type of the claim (e.g., accident, theft, damage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the interaction (e.g., call, email, in-person visit) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction */,
  "interaction_channel" TEXT /* Channel of the interaction (e.g., phone, email, chat) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "satisfaction_rating" INTEGER /* Satisfaction rating on a scale of 1-10 */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or additional feedback */,
  "feedback_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the feedback was provided (e.g., survey, email, phone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_renewals" (
  "renewal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each renewal */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the policy being renewed */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date the renewal was processed */,
  "new_premium" REAL /* New premium amount for the renewed policy */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the renewal (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "renewal_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the renewal (e.g., policy expiration, customer request) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("renewal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_renewals_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales representative, customer service agent, data analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "module_accessed" TEXT /* Module or section of the system accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "access_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the system was accessed (e.g., web, mobile, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who responded */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marketing campaign or survey */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the response was received */,
  "response_status" TEXT /* Status of the response (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "response_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the response was received (e.g., email, phone, survey) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_responses_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_responses_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the campaign */,
  "campaign_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the campaign was conducted (e.g., email, social media, print) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)
